user.title: This instance + own broker
user.description: Give THIS Home Assistant a name — it's shown on the peer side as the bridge label (e.g. 'via Radlingmayr'). Then configure this HA's local MQTT broker (typically the Mosquitto add-on on this same host). Peers will publish history responses here.

data.instance_name: Name of THIS instance (shown on peer)

peer.title: Peer MQTT Broker
peer.description: Configure the remote HA's broker. Shared entities will be published here so the peer's native MQTT integration can discover them.

selection.title: Share Selection
selection.description: Pick integrations, devices, and/or entities to share. Anything added to the read-only lists will still be visible on the peer but won't accept commands.

init.title: Share Selection
init.description: Pick integrations, devices, and/or entities to share. Read-only lists share state without accepting commands.
